findings.title: Missing Header: Content-Security-Policy
findings.remediation: Add the 'Content-Security-Policy' response header with a secure value.

findings.title: Missing Header: X-Frame-Options
findings.remediation: Add the 'X-Frame-Options' response header with a secure value.

findings.title: Missing Header: X-Content-Type-Options
findings.remediation: Add the 'X-Content-Type-Options' response header with a secure value.

findings.title: Missing Header: X-XSS-Protection
findings.remediation: Add the 'X-XSS-Protection' response header with a secure value.

findings.title: Missing Header: Referrer-Policy
findings.remediation: Add the 'Referrer-Policy' response header with a secure value.

findings.title: Missing Header: Permissions-Policy
findings.remediation: Add the 'Permissions-Policy' response header with a secure value.
